title: Marine Map Tool / marine-map-core
description: A browser-based tool (and its open-source, dependency-free figure engine) that turns coordinates or a region into a publication-quality marine map — GEBCO/ETOPO-derived bathymetry with cmocean colormaps, scale bar, north arrow, graticule, inset locator, station overlays — exported to a chosen journal's figure specification together with the PyGMT/R script that reproduces the figure.
